---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new detector, resolver, integration, or framework improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you're proposing.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? If you have a rough design in mind, describe it here.

## Component

Which part of the system is this for?

- [ ] Detection engine (new detector or rule)
- [ ] Resolution engine (new resolver or playbook)
- [ ] Event collection (new collector / integration)
- [ ] Dashboard (UI improvement)
- [ ] Infrastructure / deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples that might be useful.
